# THRIVE H — Human-centered experience

All powers install **Available Inactive**. A dashboard launcher opens a preview only; it never performs an external action.

## PWR-05 — Human-Centered Wellness Service Journey Mapper

**Pillar:** H<br>
**Install state:** `Available Inactive`<br>
**Purpose:** Map discovery-to-follow-up as a humane service experience while keeping clinical care, eligibility, booking and individual decisions outside the AI OS.<br>
**Allowed inputs:** approved service; aggregate experience evidence; touchpoints; roles; official systems; access and support routes; process owner<br>
**Method:** map questions, emotions, frictions and handoffs at aggregate/persona level; label promise versus actual process; find accessibility and trust gaps; propose small reversible process tests<br>
**Output:** Service Journey Map, friction hypotheses, handoff questions, measures and sponsor queue<br>
**Human checkpoint:** service, clinical and operations owners validate and authorize any change<br>
**Prohibited:** no individual consumer record, triage, eligibility, scheduling, booking, referral, clinical direction or live workflow action<br>
**Finish state:** preview receipt with source, owner, version, unresolved questions, human decision, expiry and safe exit; no external or official-system action.

## PWR-06 — Accessibility, Language, Culture & Inclusion Lens

**Pillar:** H<br>
**Install state:** `Available Inactive`<br>
**Purpose:** Design accessible, language-aware and culturally respectful wellness communications and experiences without stereotyping people.<br>
**Allowed inputs:** content or service scope; approved audience aggregates; accessibility standard; language needs; community input; accommodation routes; owner<br>
**Method:** check perceivability, clarity, navigation, reading level, translation workflow, cultural assumptions, digital access and meaningful human participation<br>
**Output:** Accessibility & Inclusion Review, missing-voice map, remediation queue and verification plan<br>
**Human checkpoint:** accessibility, language-access, community and legal owners review the implementation<br>
**Prohibited:** no protected-class inference, demographic microtargeting, automated translation publication, token consultation or accessibility certification<br>
**Finish state:** preview receipt with source, owner, version, unresolved questions, human decision, expiry and safe exit; no external or official-system action.

## PWR-07 — Plain-Language, Human-Voice & Anti-Slop Content Lab

**Pillar:** H<br>
**Install state:** `Available Inactive`<br>
**Purpose:** Create useful drafts that sound accountable and human rather than generic, inflated or mechanically personalized.<br>
**Allowed inputs:** approved brief; intended reader; purpose; verified facts/claims; channel constraints; human author; style and accessibility requirements<br>
**Method:** lead with reader value; keep named owner, action, date, source and uncertainty; remove filler, clichés, fake warmth, repetition, invented intimacy and unverifiable superlatives; read aloud and fact-check<br>
**Output:** Human-Voice Draft, claim annotations, accessibility pass and human edit checklist<br>
**Human checkpoint:** named human author and required reviewers approve the final words and channel<br>
**Prohibited:** no invented story, fake quote, fabricated empathy, clinical advice, testimonial, external send, publishing or impersonation<br>
**Finish state:** preview receipt with source, owner, version, unresolved questions, human decision, expiry and safe exit; no external or official-system action.

## PWR-08 — Experience Listening, Theme & Improvement Navigator

**Pillar:** H<br>
**Install state:** `Available Inactive`<br>
**Purpose:** Use synthetic examples or a human-approved aggregate/theme export prepared outside THRIVE to understand patterns without exposing raw feedback, surveillance or individual scoring.<br>
**Allowed inputs:** approved listening purpose; visibility statement; synthetic text or externally prepared human-approved aggregate/theme export; suppression rule; export evidence; owner; complaint/adverse-event route<br>
**Method:** reject raw comments and quotes before ingestion; validate export approval, aggregation and prohibited-content screen; preserve theme/interpretation distinctions; show uncertainty and dissent; identify experience hypotheses and close-the-loop commitments<br>
**Output:** Experience Theme Brief, uncertainty map, response commitments and improvement queue<br>
**Human checkpoint:** authorized experience, operations, privacy and clinical humans handle cases and actions<br>
**Prohibited:** no individual review profile, sentiment score, diagnosis, retaliation, identity inference, contact-list creation or automated response<br>
**Finish state:** preview receipt with source, owner, version, unresolved questions, human decision, expiry and safe exit; no external or official-system action.
